query:
SELECT al.id, al.talent_name, al.channel_id, al.short_code, al.url,
       yc.channel_id AS matched_channel_id, yc.channel_name AS matched_channel_name
FROM affiliate_links al
LEFT JOIN youtube_channels yc ON LOWER(TRIM(yc.channel_name)) = LOWER(TRIM(al.talent_name))
WHERE al.channel_id IS NULL
ORDER BY al.id;
